user_query: I'm writing a humorous article and I need some inspiration. Can you suggest some funny jokes and memes that I can include in the article? Also, could you provide me with a random manatee joke to add a touch of humor to the piece?

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of popular jokes from an API that provides humorous content.
Fetch a selection of trending memes to include in the article.
Get a random joke specifically about manatees from a humor database.
